steps.title: Locate the main verb
steps.content: After the subject Land, the sentence needs a finite main verb before the object his technology. The phrase to invent the world's first instant camera then explains the purpose of that action.

steps.title: Reject nonfinite forms
steps.content: B and C are infinitive forms, and D is a participle. None of those can serve as the main verb of the independent clause. The remaining choice is the needed past-tense finite verb. The answer is A.
